artPrompt: A widescreen film-still of a frantic goblin bureaucrat hunched over an overturned ballot box in a burning town square at night, fistfuls of blank slips spilling everywhere as he recounts with crazed devotion, a single oversized die clutched mid-shake in one hand; bonfire glow rims his frenzied features, embers and confetti swirling, flame orange against night-black smoke, obsessive mayhem, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Recount Clerk
text:
Recount 2 — Whenever Recount Clerk attacks, roll a six-sided die. If you roll a 2 or less, roll it again and use the new result. (When the first count is too small, you simply count again.)
Whenever you roll a die, create a 1/1 red Voter creature token.
flavorText: "The numbers don't lie. They just need a few more chances."
